name: emotion-detector-api
description: Emotion detection API with Groq (Whisper Large V3 + Llama 3.3 70B)

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); if (!fs.existsSync('public')) fs.mkdirSync('public'); const files = fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f => (f.endsWith('.html') || f.endsWith('.css') || f.endsWith('.js') || f.endsWith('.webm') || f.endsWith('.png') || f.endsWith('.jpg') || f.endsWith('.svg')) && f !== 'server.js'); files.forEach(f => { const srcPath = path.join('.', f); const destPath = path.join('public', f); fs.copyFileSync(srcPath, destPath); }); console.log('Build completed - All assets copied to public/');"
scripts.build:netlify: npm run build && echo 'Netlify build completed'
